Week 15
📖 Final Draft Submission & Publication
Final Research Paper Due


✅ Why This Works:
• Gives students more time to revise after receiving feedback.
• Makes Week 14 a revision-focused week instead of rushing into final submission.
• Keeps the research and drafting process structured but not overwhelming.

4️⃣ Is There Enough Balance Between Instructor Guidance & Student Independence?

✅ Yes, but some refinements can improve autonomy without losing support.
